name: Emoji Puzzles
author: Poki
description: Emoji Puzzles is a picturesque puzzling game where you can assemble emojis in countless shapes and sizes! The game is packed with hundreds of different emojis for you to carefully assemble, with different themes such as animals, emoticons, food, and others. All of the vibrant puzzles are available for you to choose from to begin with, and you're freely able to switch between the images at will. Can you piece together all of the puzzles? How do I play Emoji Puzzles? Click and hold on different puzzle pieces with the Left Mouse Button, then release the button when the piece is in the correct spot. Who created Emoji Puzzles? Emoji Puzzles is created by Illusive Games. Play their other games on Poki: Prismo Puzzles , Prismo Coloring and Emoji Coloring ! How can I play Emoji Puzzles for free? You can play Emoji Puzzles for free on Poki. Can I play Emoji Puzzles on mobile devices and desktop? Emoji Puzzles can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
